title: SkillsFuture Work-Study Diploma
text:
SkillsFuture Work-Study Diploma - SupportGoWhere
SkillsFuture Work-Study Diploma
Share link
Provides a head-start in career related to discipline of study for eligible fresh Institute of Technical Education (ITE) graduates.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Receive a sign-on incentive of $5,000 for eligible fresh graduates
Competitive starting salary and full-time employment with participating companies
Attain an industry-recognised Diploma-level qualification
Collapse all sections
About this support

Competitive starting salary and full-time employment with participating companies

Structured on-the-job training and mentorship over 12 to 36 months

Attainment of an industry-recognised Diploma-level qualification

Sign-on incentive of $5,000 for eligible fresh graduates

Potential for wage increments and career advancement based on performance

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizens or Permanent Residents

Fresh graduates within 3 years of graduation from the ITE

Full-time National Servicemen within 3 years of their Operationally Ready Date

How to apply?

Submit your application through the ITE's website.

Where can I find help?

View more details

SkillsFuture Hotline: 6785 5785

Call Centre Operating Hours: 
Mondays to Fridays 
8.30 am to 5.30 pm 
Closed on Sat, Sun & Public Holidays

Submit an enquiry

SkillsFuture Singapore

1 Paya Lebar Link,

#08-08, Paya Lebar Quarter 2,

Singapore 408533

Scheme last updated 06 Nov 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
